---
title: "Live Polling"
date: 2025-03-04
categories: [Reactivity]
image: banners/live_polling.png
description: "A [reactive](/docs/reactivity.html) question template of live-polling with responses shown as a bar chart."
---

<div id="template-links" data-repo="https://github.com/surveydown-dev/template_live_polling" hidden></div>

## Create this template

Run this command in your R console:

```{r}
surveydown::sd_create_survey(
  #path = "path/to/survey",
  template = "live_polling"
)
```

## Video Walkthrough

<video class="template-video" controls preload="metadata">
  <source src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/surveydown-dev/template_live_polling@main/video-recording.mp4#t=0.1" type="video/mp4">
</video>

## Learn more

- [Reactivity](/docs/reactivity.html)
- [Start with a template](/docs/getting-started.html#start-with-a-template)
